contract_analyst.label: Contract Analyst
contract_analyst.description: Searches AI vendor contract PDFs for data-use, governance, and termination clauses

data_explorer.label: FinOps Explorer
data_explorer.description: Queries structured AI spend and governance data — overage, coverage, by-BU and by-vendor analytics

governance_actions.label: Governance Actions
governance_actions.description: Routes governance issues to the AT&T AI Council via Salesforce

demo_paths.title: Overbudget Risk
questions: Which AI vendor contracts are trending over committed spend this quarter, and by how much?
Show the spend utilization ratio for every active AI contract, highest first.
What are the data-residency and training-data-usage clauses in the AT&T–OpenAI GPT-4 Turbo Enterprise agreement?
Flag the OpenAI GPT-4 Turbo Enterprise contract for governance review — missing AI governance addendum, ambiguous training-data language, expiring in Jun 2026. Assign to the AT&T AI Council.

demo_paths.title: Governance Coverage
questions: Which AI contracts expire in the next 90 days or are missing an AI governance addendum?
Which business units have the most active contracts without a training-data restriction clause?
Does the AT&T–Anthropic Claude 3 Opus agreement permit AT&T customer data to be used for model training?
Are there any AI contracts that allow EU data residency? Which ones, and in which BUs?

demo_paths.title: Portfolio View
questions: What is our total AI vendor spend by service category and business unit, ranked by committed value?
Show me total committed AI spend by vendor, ranked.
Which vendors have the most BU-level coverage at AT&T?
Compare LLM API spend to ML Platform spend across the portfolio.

demo_paths.title: Compliance Review
questions: List all AI contracts with FedRAMP or HIPAA compliance certifications.
Which vendors have the strongest governance posture — training restriction + governance addendum + data residency?
What are the MFN and price-protection clauses in the NVIDIA DGX Cloud agreement?
Flag the Snowflake Cortex contract for governance review — missing AI governance addendum, expiring Jul 2026. Route to AI Council.

placeholder: Ask about AI spend, vendor contracts, governance clauses, or take action on a contract…
